text.title: pnpm Workspaces with Dependency Catalogs Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping monorepo shape signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: still apply workspace:* for internal links

example.trace: package_count=4 → pnpm_ge_9=true → shared_deps=true → shared-dep-catalog-only → react+typescript+vitest move to catalog

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
